cnbc.title: Alphabet plans to raise $80 billion from stock sales to fund AI buildout
cnbc.summary: Alphabet said it plans to sell $80 billion in stock, including through a $10 billion investment by Berkshire Hathaway.

cnbc.title: HPE skyrockets 30% on biggest earnings beat since 2018
cnbc.summary: HPE's blowout second-quarter earnings report was highlighted by a strong Cloud & AI segment that showed soaring server revenue.

cnbc.title: Trump tells CNBC: 'I don't care' if Iran negotiations are over
cnbc.summary: President Trump spoke with CNBC's Eamon Javers about the latest with the Iran war in an interview Monday.

cnbc.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: China learns to build without Nvidia
cnbc.summary: Chinese companies are increasingly seeking Nvidia alternatives to develop self-sufficient systems, even if their own tech remains in the early stages.

cnbc.title: Asia-Pacific stocks set to open subdued amid uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace talks
cnbc.summary: Asia-Pacific markets were set to open mixed on Tuesday as investors weighed renewed uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace negotiations.

cnbc.title: Blue Origin launchpad damaged in rocket explosion may not be restored until 2028, NASA's Isaacman says
cnbc.summary: NASA has tapped Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin for several contracts in the agency's Artemis return-to-the-moon program.

cnbc.title: Microsoft and Google are late to AI coding, but 'absolutely critical' they compete for growth
cnbc.summary: Coding tools are becoming an increasingly big target for Google and Microsoft as they try to catch up to Anthropic and OpenAI.

cnbc.title: McDonald's unveils new global growth strategy to win over diners as competition rises
cnbc.summary: McDonald's new growth plan comes as inflation and high gas prices mean restaurants are competing for a smaller pool of customers.

cnbc.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
cnbc.summary: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.

cnbc.title: Trump's 'big beautiful bill' turned 529 plans into 'lifelong education' accounts, expert says: How to take advantage
cnbc.summary: New rules allow 529 plan funds to pay for eligible career training, certifications, licensing fees and continuing education costs.
